title: Allow Offline Lan Join
description: Fixes a bug where offline players are not able to join someone's lan world in same network
body:
**This mod needs to be installed on both you and your friend**

This mod allows offline players to connect to a lan world hosted on the same network WITHOUT mojang login verification errors or any weird disconnection reasons.


To use this mod, just give it to the person who is hosting the world, and then tell them to install this mod, and your set!
